_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 5 (S1): signal stacking vote thresholds. Default min_votes=1 is a pass-through — the vote collector releases every intent on first submission, matching pre-Session-5 behavior. Raise to 2 or 3 to require cross-family corroboration before an intent reaches the routing gates.
_comment_2: window_seconds is the rolling window within which distinct signal_family submissions count toward quorum. Votes older than this age are discarded.
